note: We can't get fully disjoint files here - both touch Editor.edit_file and termui.edit(). I'll keep the diff minimal and send DONE with the exact new signatures shortly. Please hold off editing these two files until my DONE, then layer process_priority on top of edit_files/edit() as an additional keyword param (e.g. edit_files(self, filenames, process_priority=None)). This avoids both of us rewriting the same lines simultaneously; final merge will reconcile via git.
